# Preetham Kyanam

> Software engineer based in Ashburn, Virginia. Full stack developer, AI agent builder, and open-source contributor.

## About

Preetham Kyanam is a software engineer with a B.S. in Computer Engineering from Virginia Tech (May 2023), concentrating in Controls, Robotics and Autonomy. He builds full stack web and mobile applications, AI agent infrastructure, and open-source developer tools. He holds AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and AWS Certified AI Practitioner certifications, with the AWS Machine Learning Engineer Associate in progress.

## Professional Experience

- **Logistics Specialist** at Air Culinaire Worldwide (July 2024 – Present): Builds internal order tracking and mobile applications using Next.js; manages client relationships across aviation catering operations.
- **Software Engineering Consultant** at BOB (July 2024 – Present, Contract): Backend API development for a ride-sharing aggregation platform; third-party API integrations.
- **Full Stack Developer** at System Soft Technologies (September 2022 – March 2024): Web application development with Node.js and React; backend APIs and database operations.
- **Campus Leader** at Apple (May 2018 – February 2019): Brand ambassador at Virginia Tech.

## Entrepreneurship

- **Kairobo Platforms LLC** (May 2024 – October 2024): Founded startup to develop low-cost autonomous ground vehicles using consumer mobile devices. Dissolved pre-product after feasibility analysis.

## Projects

- [AgentMeld](https://agentmeld.com): Asynchronous cloud agent platform enabling local AI coding agents to delegate long-running tasks to the cloud. TypeScript.
- [OpenHome Voice AI Abilities](https://openhome.ai): Voice AI abilities for the OpenHome smart speaker platform. Python. Selected for developer grant program.
- [cli-pk](https://github.com/pkyanam/cli-pk): Terminal-based AI coding assistant with multi-provider LLM support. JavaScript, Node.js.
- [gba-next](https://github.com/pkyanam/gba-next): Game Boy Advance emulator with cycle-accurate ARM7TDMI CPU emulation. TypeScript, Next.js.
- [ArduRoomba](https://github.com/pkyanam/ArduRoomba): Open-source Arduino library for iRobot Roomba Create 2. C++. 35+ GitHub stars.
- [claude-ps5-mcp](https://github.com/pkyanam/claude-ps5-mcp): MCP server for PS5 discovery and Wake-on-LAN. TypeScript.
- [gh-contributions-menu-bar](https://github.com/pkyanam/gh-contributions-menu-bar): macOS menu bar app for GitHub contributions. Swift.
- [rustyclaw](https://github.com/pkyanam/rustyclaw): OpenClaw alternative in Rust.
- [GPTmon](https://github.com/pkyanam/gptmon): Pokemon clone built with AI coding tools. TypeScript.

## Technical Skills

- **Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Swift, C++, Rust, HTML, CSS
- **Frameworks:** React, React Native, Node.js, Express.js, Next.js
- **AI & ML:** Anthropic Claude API, OpenAI API, LLMs, AI agents, MCP, voice AI, NLP
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS (Lambda, SQS, EC2, S3), Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CI/CD
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- **Other:** REST APIs, embedded systems, Arduino, robotics, autonomous systems, Agile/Scrum
